case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. LEVARN CAVERS JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAVERS JR, LEVARN $2,751.60 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,992.60, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAVERS JR, LEVARN DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2019
COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200006516) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100049479), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. SERVED AUG-13-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAVERS JR, LEVARN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200006516) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100049385) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.

DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 200006516) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200006516) AS TO DEFENDANT CAVERS JR, LEVARN
